narrative:
Precinct Waterville Township B (precinct in Lucas County) has 694 registered voters, with 49.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.3 percentage points.
